items.ci_command: jankurai audit . --mode ratchet --baseline target/jankurai/accepted-baseline.json --json target/jankurai/repo-score.json --md target/jankurai/repo-score.md

jankurai proofmark rust . --obligations target/jankurai/proofbind/obligations.json
